title:
Dimag hai to batao 👉
#viral #trending #paheliyan #viralvideos #viralpost
prompt_text: A top-down shot of six Indian Rupee coins arranged in a diamond-like pattern on a textured, light gray concrete surface. The coins include one 20-rupee coin, one 10-rupee coin, two 2-rupee coins, one 1-rupee coin, and one 5-rupee coin. The lighting is bright and even, casting minimal shadows.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A top-down shot of six Indian Rupee coins arranged in a diamond-like pattern on a textured, light gray concrete surface. The coins include one 20-rupee coin, one 10-rupee coin, two 2-rupee coins, one 1-rupee coin, and one 5-rupee coin. The lighting is bright and even, casting minimal shadows.

cinematography.cameraShot: Static, high-angle bird's-eye view. Vertical orientation.

actions: The camera remains fixed on the arrangement of coins throughout the video.
The coins are static on the concrete surface.
dialogue: Male voice in Hindi: 'Dimaag hai toh batao, ye total kitne rupaye hain? Abhi tak sahi jawaab koi nahi bata paya. Jo sahi jawaab dega usko milega bohot bada inaam.'
Translation: 'If you have a brain, tell me, how many rupees is this in total? So far, no one has been able to give the correct answer. Whoever gives the correct answer will get a very big prize.'
